subject: Pansage — small green monkey Pokemon with a leafy broccoli-like head tuft
description: A small, bright-eyed green monkey-type Pokemon stands in an active, slightly leaning pose. Its most distinctive feature is the large bushy green leaf-tuft growing from the top of its head, resembling a cluster of vegetation. The creature has a cheerful, alert expression with wide round eyes. The background is a lush green environment with streaks of light suggesting rainfall or water falling through the foliage, and large tropical-style leaves fill the backdrop. The overall palette is dominated by vivid greens with some yellow-green highlights.
foreground: small green monkey Pokemon with leafy head tuft, alert expression, slightly leaning pose
background: lush tropical foliage with water streaks or rainfall, dense green leaves
